top_support_evidence_items.document_title: AVL Opens New Hydrogen and Fuel Cell Test Center in Graz
top_support_evidence_items.excerpt: ptember 19, 2022, AVL is greatly expanding its global test infrastructure for fuel cell and hydrogen technology. The new center at the company’s headquarters in Graz has a maximum capacity of 20 high-performance testbeds, making it one of the largest and most advanced test sites for fuel cells and electrolysis systems in the world.
